i have been using a norelco t trimmer for several months  i bought it for the minishaver initially decided to grow a beard then trimmed the beard with the beard trimmer attachment  it did a great job of shaping and trimming but left a mess of clippings in the sink  after reading a million reviews i decided to try the t for its vacuum featurebr br the t is great  it does a perfect job of trimming my beard evenly setting at  ultimate beard length to be a   the best part is that about  of the clippings go into the vacuum receptical with only about  being lost  i have not come across any of the negatives adjustment slips tugs hairs and on and on mentioned in other reviews  unlike my t this trimmer lets you know when its fully charged or about to go dead and even if it does die in the middle of a session from a dead battery plugging it in finishes the job  most other trimmers only work when charged not on house currentbr br i cant think of anything this trimmer could do better  in my estimation its looks design and operation are flawless  the clipper works well on my beards neckline and the minitrimmer keeps the bottom of my mustache trimmed perfectly  i really think the t does as good a job trimming as this one does but will not run with a dead battery when plugged in and does make a mess with beard clippings all over the place  for those two reasons alone this trimmer is a best buybr br i am not putting the ts abilities down in any way  for the price it cant be beat  it trims well and the minishaver is still the best way to shave the short hairs on my cheeks above my beard on a daily basis  i use it daily along with the t and will continue to  they both have their place  if you dont mind the beard trimmings everywhere you will be happy with the t however if you are serious about perfect beard grooming and i do mean perfect with none of the mess both tools are a must

my daughter loves using chapstick so i decided this would be a fun rainy day activity to do with her since these were for my daughter i wanted to keep them fun with color and flavor  we made our chapstick with koolaid i used koolaid specifically because these tubes are clear and i love seeing the color through them these containers were fairly easy to fill  it takes a little more coordination than just a lip balm tin but i like it in these containers better especially since they are clear they have held up well so far too  the caps stay on tight and the chapstick twists up perfectly  i havent noticed any other issuesbr here is the koolaid chapstick recipe we usedbr  tbs coconut oilbr  tbs shea butterbr  tbs beeswax shavedbr a squirt of koolaid we used fruit punchbr br  mix first three ingredients in a microwave save bowlbr  after blended heat for  minutebr  mix in the koolaid until desired colour is reachedbr  pour mixture into your containers and pop it into the fridge for an hour or twobr br i think these would make great gifts chapsticklip balm is very easy to make and can be completely customizable which would be perfect for gift givingbr br disclaimer i received this product at a free or discounted rate in return for my honest and unbiased review  the words written are my own and not influenced in any way by how much i paid  if my experience with the item changes during the course of use i will make sure to update my review

first off i have to say im severely disappointed with some of the other reviews of this product as i have found them to be light years from my experience with this trimmer  thus far i have found it to be well designed well built and very easy to use  also to my surprise the vaccum works just great  yes there are still hairs that hit the sink but whadda ya want perfection  the vaccum collects easily twothirds to threequarters of the trimmed hair and thats a good thingbr br that said ive found the most impressive aspect of the trimmer is the extended precision trimming head  while not as wide as the standard trimming head it extends the cutting edge far enough away from the body of the trimmer to provide the easiest and most accurate edge trimming ive ever experienced  outlining my beard moustache and sideburns is suddenly a far easier and more precise task  for any guy who either wants or needs cleaner lines on his facial hair this is an excellent choicebr br im still getting used to the length selector and how to get the desired look before having to take off the guide comb and switch trimmer heads to get a more precise cut but im sure that will come with time  it operates in much the same way as my previous norelco trimmer but the body design of this trimmer fits much better in the hand and the guide comb assembly provides a much more comfortable trim as i glide it over my chin  its also a wonderful thing to have the fast  hour recharge timebr br the only downside ive found so far is some irritation of the skin while using the extended trimmer head  its a very sharp head and can nick you if youre not careful but i put that in the stilllearninghowtouseit category  this is truly a great trimmer so to all my proudly facially hirsute brothers i say dont believe the naysayers and pick this puppy up

instead of human eyes the tools shape is long and shallow enough of a curve to catch most of the eyelashes it is comfortable to use but takes a bit of practice once you are comfortable with the scissor motion sorry no other way to describe it used to make the curl you are rewarded with a nice noncrimpy curl the pad in this one is the best i have used this tool also opens wide enough that even the most nearsighted or lush lashed amoungst us can get it close to the base of the upper lashes the design over all is very well thought out i recommend using an magnifying mirror if you have to use bifocals i do all that said nowbr the bad  there is no replacement pad and i am questioning how sanitary this is going to be in the long run i agree completely with folks here who advise to remove of infection i would be asking the same questions which leads tobr the ugly  until you practice and are used to it wont take long the results are a bit odd looking the black pad is plushier and looks to be made of silicone and not the usual hard rubber i have found that the hard rubber pads are chiefly responsible for that weird ugly crimp you can get not so with this one i mentioned before the squeezy scissor action your thumb and index finger have to use can be tricky if you have coordination issues well  things could get uglybr suggestions for usewash your hands before use i keep the little plastic clip to keep the tool closed you could follow the advise of one person here to heat the tool with a dryer but i think i may skip that use a makeup mirror to assist you practice when you im a sucker for a good brush set its even better when it comes with case and a spongebr br so the case is very sturdy and feels well made you can use it as a brush holder and you can use it store brushes i am using the shorter half as a brush holder and find that it blends in nicely with my other holdersbr br now ill do a brief breakdown of the brushes and spongebr br the lip brush is great and it blends in my lipsticks really nicebr br there are three brushes for eyes eyeshadow brush blending brush and angled liner i have tried these and they are very soft and work very wellbr br the powder brush is a bit smaller than i would personally like for powder its not quite dense but in a brush that is used for powder products thats okay when im buffing in the powder i dont want the brush to be too dense or it will move the foundation around ive been using this brush for blush because of its smaller shape and its working greatbr br now the final two the foundation brush and the sponge i decided to do half of my foundation with the brush on one side and the other half with the sponge on the other sidebr br the foundation brush is a typical brush of its kind it did not make the foundation look streaky and applied very smoothbr br the sponge is the most interesting piece in this set it doesnt feel super soft like a beauty blender or a real techniques sponge it feels like a softer stress ball and feels a bit rubbery ive never had a sponge like this i soaked the sponge in water and drained the excess as i would do with any sponge it felt heavier but did seem to soften a bit and did expand in size i dabbed the foundation on my face and pressed the sponge around to press the product in and i got a really smooth finish the sponge did not seem to absorb much productbr br overall i think its a very nice setbr br i purchased this product at a discount in exchange for an honest review i did not get paid to do this review and my opinions are  honest

okay so this eyeshadow palette has so many different options to choose from i mean theres  different shades to choose from i mean when i first ordered this eyeshadow palette i wasnt expecting to care for it to much but i was definetly proven wrong so lets start with the cover of this eyeshadow palette this is the perfect example of why you cant always judge a book by its cover but in this case you cant judge a pallet by its cover because i think that the covers not that great i mean its not that appealing i mean with these beautiful eyeshadows that are inside this boardwalk palette you would think that the cover would be something bright and more colorful i mean if it wasnt for me actually opening the palette i would have never guessed that these beautiful eyeshadow shades would been in it okay so enough about the front cover of the palette lets get to the size so it measures  by  in a half inches so just the perfect size to fit in an overnight bag or even an everyday purse i mean thats perfect for me because i am always wanting to have the choice of choosing a different color but i mean you can only fit so many eyeshadows in your purse so this palette has been a perfect fit for me i now have the perfect palette that i can always have on the go okay so the shades in this palette i mean the pigmentation is definetly there i mean of course there are some colors in the palette that aint bright enough for me but thats just a personal thing because i love dramatic looks if you are a beginner this is a perfect palette for you i mean you have so many colors to choose from and this is such an amazing bargain the price is very affordable okay well now that i wrote a novel about this boardwalk eyeshadow palette i will get to my final opnion and of course i definetly reccommend this eyeshadow palette
